MSI Publications

MSI Publications

Brent R: (2004) Building an artificial regulatory system to understand a natural one. Cell, 116:S73-74, 71 p following S76. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Brent R: (2004) Intuition and innumeracy. Cell Biol Educ, 3:88-90. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Brent R: (2004) A partnership between biology and engineering. Nat Biotechnol, 22:1211-1214.
[ PubMed | PDF ]

Brent R: (2000) Genomic biology. Cell, 100:169-183. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Brent R: (1999) Functional genomics: learning to think about gene expression data. Curr Biol, 9:R338-341. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Brent R: (1997) Looms to weave genomic nets. Nat Genet, 16:216-217. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Brent R, Bruck J: (2006) 2020 computing: can computers help to explain biology? Nature, 440:416-417. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Brent R, Burbulis I: (2005) Reply to "Lamp for tadpoles". Nature Methods, 2:635-636. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Brent R, Finley RL, Jr.: (1997) Understanding gene and allele function with two-hybrid methods. Annu Rev Genet, 31:663-704. [ PubMed ]

Brent R, Kodadek T: (2000) Interaction, Assembly and Processing: Life on the Interface. Curr Opin Chem Bio, 4:13-15. [ PDF ]

Brent R, Lok L: (2005) Cell biology. A fishing buddy for hypothesis generators. Science, 308:504-506.
[ PubMed | PDF ]

Burbulis I, Yamaguchi K, Gordon A, Carlson R, Brent R: (2005) Using protein-DNA chimeras to detect and count small numbers of molecules. Nat Methods, 2:31-37. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Burbulis IE, Winkel-Shirley B: (1999) Interactions among enzymes of the Arabidopsis flavonoid biosynthetic pathway. Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A, 96:12929-12934. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Carlson R, Brent R: (1999) Double-stranded DNA arrays: next steps in the surface campaign. Nat Biotechnol, 17:536-537. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Chin TE, Wong RB, Pont JL, Karu AE: (2002) Haptens and monoclonal antibodies for immunoassay of imidazolinone herbicides. J Agric Food Chem, 50:3380-3389. [ PubMed ]

Cohen BA, Colas P, Brent R: (1998) An artificial cell-cycle inhibitor isolated from a combinatorial library. Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A, 95:14272-14277. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Colas P, Brent R: (1998) The impact of two-hybrid and related methods on biotechnology. Trends Biotechnol, 16:355-363. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Colas P, Cohen B, Jessen T, Grishina I, McCoy J, Brent R: (1996) Genetic selection of peptide aptamers that recognize and inhibit cyclin-dependent kinase 2. Nature, 380:548-550. [ PubMed ]

Colas P, Cohen B, Ko Ferrigno P, Silver PA, Brent R: (2000) Targeted modification and transportation of cellular proteins. Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A, 97:13720-13725. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Colman-Lerner A, Brent R: (2000) Using peptide aptamers to analyze the proteome. Trends Cell Bio:56-60. [ PDF ]

Colman-Lerner A, Chin TE, Brent R: (2001) Yeast Cbk1 and Mob2 activate daughter-specific genetic programs to induce asymmetric cell fates. Cell, 107:739-750. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Colman-Lerner A, Fischman ML, Lanuza GM, Bissell DM, Kornblihtt AR, Baranao JL: (1999) Evidence for a role of the alternatively spliced ED-I sequence of fibronectin during ovarian follicular development. Endocrinology, 140:2541-2548. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Colman-Lerner A, Gordon A, Serra E, Chin T, Resnekov O, Endy D, Pesce CG, Brent R (2005) Regulated cell-to-cell variation in a cell-fate decision system. Nature, 437:699-706.
[ PubMed | PDFs: article, supplementary materials, figures ]

Crater DL, Wade KH, Resnekov O, Ichikawa HT, Kroos L, Brannigan JA, Moran CP, Jr.: (2002) A mutation in GerE that affects cotC promoter activation in Bacillus subtilis. Biochim Biophys Acta, 1576:30-38. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Dehlin E, von Gabain A, Alm G, Dingelmaier R, Resnekov O: (1996) Repression of beta interferon gene expression in virus-infected cells is correlated with a poly(A) tail elongation. Mol Cell Biol, 16:468-474. [ PubMed ]

Endy D, Brent R: (2001) Modelling cellular behaviour. Nature, 409:391-395. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Fabbrizio E, Le Cam L, Polanowska J, Kaczorek M, Lamb N, Brent R, Sardet C: (1999) Inhibition of mammalian cell proliferation by genetically selected peptide aptamers that functionally antagonize E2F activity. Oncogene, 18:4357-4363. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Finley RL, Jr., Brent R: (1994) Interaction mating reveals binary and ternary connections between Drosophila cell cycle regulators. Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A, 91:12980-12984. [ PubMed ]

Fung TH, Ball GI, McQuiade SC, Chao S-H, Colman-Lerner A, Holl M, Meldrum DR: Microprinting on On-chip Cultures: Patterning of Yeast Cell Microarrays using Concalavin-A Adhesion. In ASME International Mechanical Engineering Congress; Anaheim, CA: American Society of Mechanical Engineers: 2004.

Geyer CR, Brent R: (2000) Selection of genetic agents from random peptide aptamer expression libraries. Methods Enzymol, 328:171-208. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Geyer CR, Colman-Lerner A, Brent R: (1999) "Mutagenesis" by peptide aptamers identifies genetic network members and pathway connections. Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A, 96:8567-8572. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Gordon A, Colman-Lerner A, Chin TE, Benjamin KR, Yu, R.C., Brent R: (2007) Single-cell quantification of molecules and rates using open-source microscope-basd cytometry. Nat Methods, [PDFs: article, supplement 1, supplement 2, supplement 3, supplement 5].

Lok L: (2004) The need for speed in stochastic simulation. Nat Biotechnol, 22:964-965. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Lok L: (2002) Pathfinder and other tools for analyzing signal transduction networks. Ann N Y Acad Sci, 971:589-594. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Lok L, Brent R: (2005) Response to "On-the-fly" or "generate first" modeling. Nat Biotechnol, 23:1345. [ PDF ]

Lok L, Brent R: (2005) Automatic generation of cellular reaction networks with Moleculizer 1.0. Nat Biotechnol, 23:131-136. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Mendelsohn AR, Brent R: (1998) Postgenomic protein analysis: the next bend in the river. Nat Biotechnol, 16:520-521. [ PubMed | PDF ]

Resnekov O: (1999) Role of the sporulation protein BofA in regulating activation of the Bacillus subtilis developmental transcription factor sigmaK. J Bacteriol, 181:5384-5388. [ PubMed | PDF ]
